failed_attempts:
and then `(fun a => ...)` would turn this into `(((transcript, prvState'), outerStmtIn, outerWitIn), queryLog)`, but the LHS would be `((transcript, (prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)), queryLog)`, which is not the same. 

But perhaps this is just a way to `flatten` the structure. 

But if we think of `a : ((transcript, prvState'), queryLog)`, then `a.1.1 = transcript`, `a.1.2 = prvState'`, and then `(a.1.1, a.1.2, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)` is `(transcript, prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)`, so the RHS would be `((transcript, prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn), queryLog)`.

But the LHS is `((transcript, (prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)), queryLog)`. 

To equate these, we would need an equivalence that can transform `(transcript, (prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))` into `(transcript, prvState', outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)`, but this would essentially be `Option`-like manipulations (since `transcript` and `prvState'` have to be preserved).

But in Lean, the `simulatesQ` expects an equivalence, and here perhaps we can take the equivalence to be something like:

`Equiv (A × (B × C × D)) (A × B × C × D)` defined by `(a, (b, c, d)) ↔ (a, b, c, d)`.

But in the Lean code, it is not possible because we don't have the decomposition of the LHS as `(transcript, ...)`. 

But perhaps we need to rework the Lean statement to reflect this equivalence.

Alternatively, perhaps we are trying to use `simulatesQ` incorrectly. Maybe we are trying to say that the query logs are the same

theorem liftContext_runWithLogToRound
    {lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut
                        OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut}
    {outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn} {outerWitIn : OuterWitIn} {i : Fin (n + 1)}
    (P : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec) :
      (P.liftContext lens).runWithLogToRound i outerStmtIn outerWitIn
      = do
        let ⟨⟨transcript, prvState⟩, queryLog⟩ ←
          (P.runWithLogToRound i).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
        return ⟨⟨transcript, ⟨prvState, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn⟩⟩, queryLog⟩ := by
  unfold runWithLogToRound
  induction i using Fin.induction with
  | zero => 
    simp [liftContext, Function.uncurry]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.toFun_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.ofFun_def]) <;>
    (try congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Product.comp_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Equiv.toFun_def]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  | succ i ih =>
    simp only [Fin.induction_succ, ih, bind_pure_comp,
      liftContext_processRound, ChallengeIdx, bind_map_left, Prod.mk.eta]
    simp [processRound]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.toFun_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.ofFun_def]) <;>
    (try congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Product.comp_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [Equiv.toFun_def]
        <;>
        aesop
      })

theorem liftContext_runWithLogToRound
    {lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut
                        OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut}
    {outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn} {outerWitIn : OuterWitIn} {i : Fin (n + 1)}
    (P : Prover oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec) :
      (P.liftContext lens).runWithLogToRound i outerStmtIn outerWitIn
      = do
        let ⟨⟨transcript, prvState⟩, queryLog⟩ ←
          (P.runWithLogToRound i).uncurry (lens.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn))
        return ⟨⟨transcript, ⟨prvState, outerStmtIn, outerWitIn⟩⟩, queryLog⟩ := by
  unfold runWithLogToRound
  induction i using Fin.induction with
  | zero => 
    simp [liftContext, Function.uncurry]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.toFun_def]) <;>
    (try simp_all [Equiv.ofFun_def]) <;>
    (try congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp_all [Context.Lens_proj]) <;

(try simp_all [runToRound, processRound, Function.uncurry])
    <;>
    (try ext <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try congr 1 <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
  | succ i ih =>
    simp_all [Fin.castSucc_zero, Fin.castSucc_succ]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [runToRound, processRound, Function.uncurry])
    <;>
    (try ext <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try congr 1 <;> simp_all [Function.uncurry])
    <;>
    (try aesop)

> rfl
  | succ i ih =>
    simp only [Fin.induction_succ, ih, bind_pure_comp,
      liftContext_processRound, ChallengeIdx, bind_map_left, Prod.mk.eta]
    simp [processRound]
    <;> sorry

simp_all [runToRound, Context.Lens]
    <;>
    rfl
  | succ i ih =>
    simp only [Fin.induction_succ, ih, bind_pure_comp,
      liftContext_processRound, ChallengeIdx, bind_map_left, Prod.mk.eta]
    simp [processRound]
    <;>
    simp_all [Context.Lens]
    <;>
    rfl
